source: agent-flywheel.com cost-breakdown table mirrored into Hoopoe per plan.md §13

rows.displayName: Cloud VPS (64 GB Ubuntu, Contabo or OVH)
rows.notes: VPS hosts the Flywheel toolchain; Hoopoe daemon runs here.
$200 standard / $400 power tier. Drives Claude Code (Opus, Sonnet).
Drives Oracle for the planning pipeline (only path to ChatGPT Pro web).
Variable pricing; drives Gemini CLI (Gemini 3 Pro with Deep Think). Cost set to 0 when unmeasured per §1.4 inspectability.

comparison: For comparison, a junior developer is $5,000+/month; under $700 buys a 10+-agent swarm running 24/7.
